traceability_rows.trace_rule: approved layout subject hash is the direct upstream compiler boundary
traceability_rows.test_obligation: candidate-check with P3-SPEC-LAYOUT review decision passes

traceability_rows.trace_rule: source intake records must be frozen, hashed, and source-attributed before compilation
traceability_rows.test_obligation: source review decision sha256 and subject hash are bound

traceability_rows.trace_rule: experience distillation sections may be assembled only from approved distillation authority
traceability_rows.test_obligation: distillation review decision sha256 and subject hash are bound

traceability_rows.trace_rule: interaction closure paths and messages must conserve approved closure semantic units
traceability_rows.test_obligation: unknown interaction semantic unit refs are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: page element and atomic inventory units must remain traceable to approved element authority
traceability_rows.test_obligation: non-atomic or missing element semantic units are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: pattern semantics and presentation decisions must be compiled through approved pattern refs only
layout carrier, containment, information completeness, z-axis, and Figma metadata bindings must conserve approved layout semantics
traceability_rows.test_obligation: layout semantic addition or omission is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: closed input hash, stage order, section order, and schema identities drive every output sidecar

traceability_rows.source: natural language authority and inventory skeleton dual rail
traceability_rows.trace_rule: approved prose carries meaning while inventory proves coverage and conservation
traceability_rows.test_obligation: compiler prose rewrite and inventory-as-authority are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: stage and section order are explicit numeric records and output hashes reproduce
manifest blocking counts must match conservation findings and PASS cannot contain blockers
traceability_rows.test_obligation: PASS with blocking counts is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: QA after compilation may report but must not mutate compiled artifacts
traceability_rows.test_obligation: forbidden QA writes or mutations are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: assurance may inspect compiler outputs and QA findings but cannot use compiler to repair semantics
traceability_rows.test_obligation: assurance handoff remains read-only until authorized implementation gate
